reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live signal has no historical analog and must be sized down or vetoed regardless of conviction.
reflection.mechanism: Conviction measures live indicator agreement, but green_matches counts how many times a similar indicator configuration existed in the historical memory bank and made money. When green_matches=0 the current setup is a novel configuration with no proven institutional follow-through — high conviction on an unprecedented pattern is overfitting to present noise, not detecting a repeatable flow regime. AUDNZD SHORT (conv=100%, green_matches=0, hist_hr=0%) and USDJPY LONG (conv=50%, green_matches=0, hist_hr=0%) are exactly these traps.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.0  # veto; elif green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0: size *= 0.5

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
